title: centaurea × jaceiformis
intro: Centaurea × jaceiformis is a hybrid plant belonging to the family Asteraceae, derived from the cross between Centaurea cyanus and Jacobaea maritima. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with Centaurea × jaceiformis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Centaurea × jaceiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
